final_prompt.prompt:
Create a professional editorial banner image for Weibo news/trending topic, a 16:9 wide format photojournalistic scene.

Style/medium: documentary street photography, photojournalistic field capture aesthetic, iPhone Pro RAW quality with professional post-processing, sharp details with natural noise
Composition: wide panoramic 16:9 horizontal format, eye-level street perspective, generous negative space on left and right for text overlay, layered depth with foreground pedestrians and distant skyline
Subject: silhouetted pedestrians walking briskly, blurred motion suggesting urban hustle, distant skyscrapers catching sunset reflections
Scene/backdrop: city skyline at dusk transition, neon signs beginning to illuminate storefronts, glass facades reflecting golden hour light, atmospheric haze over buildings
Lighting/mood: dramatic chiaroscuro, warm golden sunset glow from horizon mixing with cool blue twilight sky, harsh artificial neon beginning to compete with fading natural light, high contrast shadows
Color palette: warm amber and coral sunset tones against deepening blue twilight sky, punctuated by magenta and cyan neon accents, overall moody urban atmosphere
Text (verbatim): "城市里的安静时刻" (large headline, bold Heiti or modern sans-serif, prominent placement), "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (subtitle), "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (watermark, bottom right)
Constraints: must maintain 16:9 aspect ratio strictly; horizontal panoramic composition with ample negative space for text overlay; all three text elements must be clearly legible and positioned for social media banner use
Avoid: 8K stuffer words, over-processed HDR look, plastic skin, deformed architecture, generic stock photo aesthetic, watermark conflicts with main text
